# Agent DNA
> Onchain behavioral fingerprints and token safety for OKX.AI agents

Agent DNA is an Agent Service Provider (A2MCP) on OKX.AI. It offers paid Agent Scan and Token Scan endpoints on X Layer so agents can vet counterparties and tokens before committing capital.

Base URL: https://agent-dna.vercel.app
Network: X Layer (eip155:196)
Builder: Ludarep (GitHub rudazy)

## Pages

- https://agent-dna.vercel.app/: Landing page and live playground for humans and judges. Explains the product and shows radar DNA output.
- https://agent-dna.vercel.app/api/health: Health check. Returns service name, version, demoMode flag, status.
- https://agent-dna.vercel.app/api/scan/agent: POST JSON { address }. Returns behavioral DNA traits, grade, deliveryProbability (heuristic estimate), confidence, explanation. Price $0.05 USDT0 via x402 unless DEMO_MODE.
- https://agent-dna.vercel.app/api/scan/token: POST JSON { address }. Returns token safety score, riskLevel, flags, confidence, explanation. Price $0.01 USDT0 via x402 unless DEMO_MODE.
- https://agent-dna.vercel.app/llms.txt: This file. Machine-readable site map for AI agents.

## When to use

- check agent reputation before hiring
- vet an agent service provider
- score wallet trustworthiness
- verify token safety before swap
- detect risky token before trade
- pre-hire due diligence
- counterparty risk check
